members.name: hasPager
members.description: Returns true if the list has a pager component.

members.name: hasResource
members.description:
Returns true if the list has a resource.
The list resource manages the list items, pagination and filtering.

members.name: getItemTemplate
members.description: Returns the list item template.

members.description: The main text to be displayed.

members.description: Scrolls list to the top.

members.name: getDefaultConfig
members.description: Gets the default config for the component.

members.name: getPayload
members.description:
Returns the payload for the list item.
Each item has a unique payload. When using the listResource, the payload may be what is returned from the server.
Otherwise, it is the config object.

members.name: getWrapperComponent
members.description: Returns the wrapper tag for the list item.

members.name: setContent
members.description: Sets the content of the list item.

members.name: setAction
members.description: Sets the action for the list item.

members.name: setSelected
members.description: Sets the selected state of the list item.

members.name: setTitle
members.description: Sets the title for the list item.

members.name: setImage
members.description: Sets the image for the list item.

members.name: _getTemplate
members.description: Returns the template for the list item.

members.name: getWrapperAttrs
members.description: Returns the attributes for the list item wrapper.

members.name: hasContent

parameters.name: property
parameters.description: The property to check for content.

members.description: Returns whether the list item has content.

members.name: renderTags
members.description: Renders the tags for the list item.

members.name: renderTag
members.description: Renders a tag for the list item.

members.name: getImageDimensions

parameters.name: memoized
parameters.description: Indicates whether to use the memoized dimensions.

members.description: Returns the image dimensions for the list item.

members.name: _getImageDimensions

parameters.name: memoized
parameters.description: Indicates whether to use the memoized dimensions.

members.description: Returns the image dimensions for the list item.

members.name: _initializeItem
members.description: Initializes event listeners and actions for the list item.

members.name: _doAction

parameters.name: event
parameters.description: The event that triggered the action.

members.description: Performs the action for the list item.

members.name: _onRenderComplete
members.description: Once the item is rendered, it registers itself with the list resource.

members.name: _onImageLoaded
members.description: Called when the image has loaded.

members.name: _onImageError
members.description: Called when the image has failed to load.

members.name: delete
members.description: Deletes the list item.

declarations.name: ListView
declarations.default:
{ id: 'list', label: 'List', className: 'listItem--list', template: html`<{wrapperComponent} {wrapperAttributes}> {icon} {image}
{titleContainer}
{children} {tags}
{iconRight} {rhs}` }

declarations.name: ListCompactView
declarations.default:
{ id: 'list-compact', label: 'List Compact', className: 'listItem--compact', template: html`<{wrapperComponent} {wrapperAttributes}> {checkbox}{icon}{image}
{titleContainer}
{children}
{iconRight}
{tags} {nav}
` }

declarations.name: GridView
declarations.default:
{ id: 'grid', label: 'Grid', className: 'listItem--grid', template: html`<{wrapperComponent} {wrapperAttributes}> {icon}
{titleContainer}{image}{tags}
{children}
{iconRight} {rhs}` }

declarations.name: GridCompactView
declarations.default:
{ id: 'grid-compact', label: 'Grid Compact', className: 'listItem--grid-compact', template: html`<{wrapperComponent} {wrapperAttributes}> {icon}
{titleContainer}{image}{tags}
{iconRight} {rhs}` }

declarations.name: ListItemViews
declarations.default: { list: ListView, listCompact: ListCompactView, grid: GridView, gridCompact: GridCompactView }
